ddls:
CREATE TABLE "idols" (
  "idol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each idol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the idol */,
  "influence_score" REAL /* Influence score of the idol (calculated based on social media engagement) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the idol belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the idol */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the idol's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the idol's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the idol's profile was last updated */,
  "total_followers" INTEGER /* Total number of followers the idol has across all accounts */,
  "total_tweets" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets the idol has posted */,
  "total_favs" INTEGER /* Total number of favorites (likes) the idol has received */,
  "total_retweets" INTEGER /* Total number of retweets the idol has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_idols_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "idol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the idol managing the account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., personal, official) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the account has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was last updated */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the account's profile image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_idol_id FOREIGN KEY ("idol_id") REFERENCES idols ("idol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "idol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the idol who posted the tweet */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account that posted the tweet */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text of the tweet */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was posted */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "fav_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites (likes) the tweet has received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tweet was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tweet was last updated */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation where the tweet was posted */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter Web App, Twitter for iPhone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_idol_id FOREIGN KEY ("idol_id") REFERENCES idols ("idol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favs" (
  "fav_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that received the favorite */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the favorite */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account that gave the favorite */,
  "fav_date" TEXT /* Date the favorite was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the favorite was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the favorite was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fav_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favs_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that was retweeted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account that retweeted */,
  "retweet_date" TEXT /* Date the retweet was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the retweet was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the retweet was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influence_scores" (
  "influence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influence score */,
  "idol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the idol */,
  "score" REAL /* Influence score of the idol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the influence score was calculated */,
  "total_followers" INTEGER /* Total number of followers the idol had on the date the score was calculated */,
  "total_tweets" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets the idol had posted on the date the score was calculated */,
  "total_favs" INTEGER /* Total number of favorites (likes) the idol had received on the date the score was calculated */,
  "total_retweets" INTEGER /* Total number of retweets the idol had received on the date the score was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influence_scores_idol_id FOREIGN KEY ("idol_id") REFERENCES idols ("idol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "min_score" REAL /* Minimum influence score to be in this category */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum influence score to be in this category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analyst account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analyst account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the analyst last logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions the analyst has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)
